  "claims": [
    "K-12 school districts across California will be able to save millions of taxpayers’ dollars when renovating or constructing new on-campus facilities due to Senate Bill 956.",
    "Senate Bill 956 aims to improve outcomes for students by providing them with a safe, environmentally sustainable, and positive learning environment.",
    "Senate Bill 956 will enable K-12 school districts to expedite construction of new on-campus facilities.",
